rawIntent: Add a notifications module under src/modules/notifications with POST /notifications (create a notification with userId, title, body, channel email|sms|push, scheduledFor) and GET /notifications. Persist via the shared db layer. Validate input with Zod. Require operator role.

successCriteria.description: A new notifications module exists with endpoints POST /notifications and GET /notifications.
Notifications are persisted via the shared db layer.
Input for notifications is validated using Zod.
Access to the notifications endpoints requires the operator role.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
